title: Uragoga heteromorpha
taxonomy: Uragoga heteromorpha is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. It belongs to the genus Uragoga, which is a group of flowering plants native to tropical Africa. The classification of Uragoga heteromorpha places it within the order Gentianales, a large and diverse group of flowering plants.
